name: Apollo Diversified Credit Securitize Fund (ACRED)
chain: Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, Aptos, Avalanche, Ink, Sei

issuer.name: Apollo Global Management (NYSE: APO) via Securitize feeder fund

oracle.name: Securitize transfer agent reports daily NAV

summary: Apollo's flagship private credit fund brought on-chain. ACRED is a feeder into Apollo Diversified Credit Fund ($1B+ underlying), covering corporate direct lending, asset-backed lending, performing and dislocated credit. Notable for daily NAV (vs typical quarterly), 24/7 redemption capability, and DeFi composability via sACRED (a derivative token usable in Morpho/Compound looping strategies). Most significant institutional RWA launch of 2025: Apollo ($730B+ AUM) making a tokenized fund publicly available across 7 chains.

sources.title: CoinDesk: Apollo tokenized private credit fund coverage
Securitize + Gauntlet leveraged ACRED DeFi strategy

underlying_asset: Apollo Diversified Credit Fund: corporate direct lending, asset-backed lending, performing credit, dislocated credit, structured credit.
reserve_composition: Feeder fund holds units of underlying Apollo Diversified Credit Fund (~$1B AUM).
secondary_market: Securitize Markets ATS; sACRED derivative deployed on Morpho (Polygon) for DeFi leverage strategies.
oracle_provider: Securitize as transfer agent reports daily NAV.
redemption_mechanism: Native redemptions at daily NAV via Securitize; sACRED variant enables permissionless DeFi use while maintaining Reg D compliance.
upgrade_authority: Apollo fund management + Securitize transfer agent; sACRED smart contracts via Morpho governance.

timeline.event: ACRED launched on 6 chains: Ethereum, Solana, Polygon, Aptos, Avalanche, Ink
sACRED leveraged DeFi strategy launched on Polygon via Morpho + Gauntlet
